content.en:
In addition to these benefits, the top powers also have special rights.

For example, if some forces are destroyed, even medium forces and powerful forces, the Boundary Court Headquarters will not take care of it, but it must not go too far, otherwise the Boundary Court Headquarters will still intervene.

It is really because of this special right that many forces dream of becoming the top power.

The reason why there is such a special right is that the realm of the gods needs the top forces to fight against the abyss of the demon seed, if the top forces destroy the small forces that offend them, they will be sanctioned and punished, then how can the top forces develop?

Therefore, even if a lot of things are caused, the headquarters of the Boundary Court can at most let the top forces pay some fines.

It is precisely because of this that the top forces can develop and grow to their heart's content, and there is almost no conflict between the top forces, resulting in the strength of the top forces being extremely strong, and also making the strength of the Realm God Kingdom very strong.

As for the medium forces and strong forces, even if some are destroyed, there will not be much loss to the realm of the gods.

On the other hand, the loss of a top power has a somewhat greater impact.

......

The realm of the gods.

The headquarters of the Heavenly Fire Alliance.

The high-level realm gods here learned that the human race had become a top force, and immediately ordered that the human race should no longer be suppressed~, and they did not dare to suppress it anymore.

Their original strength was not as good as the Terrans, but they only relied on the status of the top forces and the protection of the Realm Court to dare to suppress the Terrans.

But now, the human race is already a top force, even if Ye Tian disobeys the order of the Boundary Court and kills the entire Heavenly Fire God Alliance with his own strength, the Headquarters of the Boundary Court will not execute Ye Tian, at most he will be punished heavily.

But at that time, the Heavenly Fire God Alliance was gone, and there was no point in punishing more.

Therefore, they didn't dare to provoke Ye Tian anymore.

Fortunately, they are still the top forces, and they have the protection of the Boundary Court Headquarters, once Ye Tian dares to attack the Heavenly Fire God Alliance, the Boundary Court Headquarters will still stop it.

The Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance is naturally not afraid of being wiped out by the Terrans, and the Terrans have only just become the top power, and they can't do it if they want to suppress the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance.

However, they also knew very well that if they did not give birth to a high-level peak realm god who condensed the nine Eternal Realm Spirits, then the status of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance would be lower and lower, and they would not even be qualified to fight with the human race in the future.

So, they practiced hard and tried to restore the strength of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance.

......

The news that the Terrans have become a top force really shocked many top powers.

For example, those top forces in the Eastern Ukraine Realm were very surprised.

They knew that the Terrans would become the top power, but they didn't expect it to be so soon, it was completely unexpected!

Afterwards.

Ye Tian sent ten middle-level realm gods to serve in the realm court headquarters, and they were all not low positions.

And Ye Tian is also continuing to cultivate middle-level peak realm gods, only ten middle-level peak realm gods, this is far from enough, and he has to continue to cultivate.

However, after these middle-level peak realm gods reach such cultivation, there is no way to continue to obtain the resources of the human race to cultivate, and then if they want to improve their cultivation and impact the high-level realm gods, they have to rely on themselves.

Time flies.

There are more and more middle-level realm gods of the human race, but it is difficult for the middle-level peak realm gods to continue to give birth to one.

And as time passed, the death zone of the Eternal Realm faded away.

It won't be long before the Eternal Realm is fully restored.

And at this time, the top treasure land of the Eternal Kingdom Realm was also born one after another, and the Terran often competed with some other forces for some treasure land resources, and with more resources, the number of Terran powerhouses naturally increased rapidly.

Many human races have gained opportunities, and their strength has improved very quickly, so there is no need for Ye Tian to worry about it at all.

And Ye Tian is also acquiring the Black Leaf Demon Gold, after the Terran has become a top force, it will be much easier to deal with other top forces.

In this way, Ye Tian acquired a lot of Black Leaf Demon Gold.

"The Black Leaf Demon Gold is still helpful to me, with the help of the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold, I can still refine the Eternal Dao Seed!"

But Ye Tian also knew very well that it was very difficult to refine the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit with the help of the Black Leaf Demon Gold, and the Black Leaf Demon Gold needed was simply a huge number.

But no matter what, the Black Leaf Demon Gold can help him quickly improve his cultivation, and it is also the only resource he knows that can quickly refine the Eternal Dao Seed, and he has no other means to quickly improve the Eternal Dao Seed.

If you slowly refine and improve the Eternal Dao Seed, if you want to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit, the time required is too long, and it is a small unit of more than 100 million to the Dao Era.

In that case, it would take too long, and he didn't want to practice so slowly, so he naturally had to rely on resources to improve himself.

That's it.

Ye Tian continued to acquire the Black Leaf Demon Gold, and one of the copy bodies was specifically responsible for refining the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold and refining the Eternal Dao Seed, while the other copy bodies only needed to be busy acquiring the Black Leaf Demon Gold.

Of course, he was also trying to find resources that would help refine his Eternal Dao Seed, and if he could find other alternatives, it would naturally be the best.

However, this kind of resources that could help him quickly improve the Eternal Dao Seed did exist, but they were all extremely precious and rare, and other high-level realm gods also needed them, so they could not be obtained in large quantities.

Like the Black Leaf Demon Gold, it is useless to other high-level realm gods, these high-level realm gods dare not use the Black Leaf Demon Gold to refine the Eternal Dao Seed, so he has the opportunity to purchase the Black Leaf Demon Gold at a very low price, otherwise he will not be able to buy it in large quantities.

So, he wanted to find a special resource similar to the Black Leaf Demon Gold.

......

Before you know it, 100 million years have passed.

At this point, nearly half of the Eternal Realm was back to normal.

Moreover, there are also many boundary cracks born here, but they are all occupied by major forces, and the Terrans also occupy some boundary cracks, relying on the resources of these boundary cracks to grow rapidly, but there are also many Terran realm gods who have fallen into the hands of the demon seed in the boundary cracks.

But on the whole, the strength of the human race is still growing by leaps and bounds.

this day.

Somewhere in the Terran territory, an entrance to a boundary crack appeared, and it was reported to Ye Tian as soon as possible.

Because this rift is not an ordinary rift, but a boundary rift.

"Is it really the Boundary of the Seams?"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

Immediately, he immediately went.

Soon, he entered the place that seemed to be the boundary of the boundary rift and explored.

At this time, he was sure that this was really a boundary rift realm, and it was also a boundary rift realm that had only been bred for a short time, and it had not even been discovered by the demon seeds.
